---
title: "Publications"
comments: false
---


::: pub-links

[{{< ai orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-7528-3795)
[{{< ai google-scholar >}}](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=zcITcLUAAAAJ)
[{{< ai clarivate >}}](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/ACB-4594-2022)

:::

```{r}
#| results: asis
#| echo: false
source("R/bib.R")
render_bibliography("references.bib")
```
